categories.label: UPI Fraud
categories.description: Fraud involving UPI (Unified Payments Interface) transactions including unauthorized transfers, fake QR codes, and UPI ID impersonation

categories.label: Vishing (Voice Phishing)
categories.description: Voice phishing attacks where fraudsters impersonate bank officials, government agents, or service providers over phone calls to steal money or information

categories.label: Phishing
categories.description: Online phishing attacks through fake websites, emails, or SMS designed to steal login credentials, personal information, or financial data

categories.label: Investment Scam
categories.description: Investment fraud where scammers promise high returns on investments in stocks, crypto, forex, or fake businesses, then disappear with the money

categories.label: Sextortion
categories.description: Blackmail or extortion involving sexual content, images, or videos - perpetrators threaten to expose private material unless money is paid or more content is provided
